title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence of an array. Optimize for O(n log n) to win in Optimization mode.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers.

botCodes.code:
import bisect
n=int(input())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
tails=[]
for x in a:
    i=bisect.bisect_left(tails,x)
    if i==len(tails):tails.append(x)
    else:tails[i]=x
print(len(tails))

let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in let tails=Array.make n 0 in let sz=ref 0 in let lb x=let lo=ref 0 and hi=ref !sz in while !lo < !hi do let m=(!lo + !hi)/2 in if tails.(m)<x then lo:=m+1 else hi:=m done;!lo in Array.iter(fun x->let pos=lb x in tails.(pos)<-x;if pos = !sz then incr sz)a;Printf.printf"%d\n" !sz
